scripts.KR: 토시살, Hanger Steak. 반드시 Peeled 또는 Denuded 상태로 받습니다. 막이 남아있으면 절대 수령 거부. 막 제거 후 결 방향 확인하고 두께 1.5센티미터로 스테이크 컷. 프라임 등급만 취급.
scripts.EN: Hanger Steak, Toshi-sal. Receive only Peeled or Denuded cuts. Reject deliveries with membrane remaining. After membrane removal, check grain direction and cut 1.5 centimeter thick. Prime grade only.
scripts.ES: Hanger Steak, Toshi-sal. Reciba solo cortes Peeled o Denuded. Rechace entregas con membrana. Tras remover la membrana, verifique fibra y corte 1.5 centimetros de grosor. Solo Prime grade.

scripts.KR: 제비추리, Shoulder Tender 또는 Teres Major. 반드시 Whole 형태로만 받습니다. 이미 슬라이스된 상태는 수령 거부. 절단 시 가늘고 길게, 두께 1센티미터.
scripts.EN: Shoulder Tender, Teres Major. Accept only Whole form. Reject pre-sliced deliveries. Cut thin and long, 1 centimeter thick.
scripts.ES: Shoulder Tender, Teres Major. Acepte solo forma entera. Rechace rebanadas previas. Corte delgado y largo, 1 centimetro de grosor.

scripts.KR: 안창살, Inside Skirt Steak. 반드시 INSIDE만 받습니다. Outside Skirt는 완전히 다른 부위, 수령 거부. Peeled 상태 확인 필수.
scripts.EN: Inside Skirt Steak. Receive only INSIDE skirt. Outside Skirt is a completely different cut — reject. Must be Peeled.
scripts.ES: Inside Skirt Steak. Reciba solo INSIDE skirt. Outside Skirt es corte diferente — rechace. Debe estar Peeled.

scripts.KR: 치마살, Beef Flap Meat 또는 Sirloin Flap. Peeled 스펙 필수. 이 스펙 없으면 수율이 40퍼센트까지 손실. 결 확인 후 스테이크 컷.
scripts.EN: Beef Flap Meat, Sirloin Flap. Peeled spec is required. Without it, yield loss reaches 40 percent. Check grain and steak cut.
scripts.ES: Beef Flap Meat, Sirloin Flap. Peeled es obligatorio. Sin esto, perdida de rendimiento llega a 40 por ciento. Verifique fibra y corte bistec.

scripts.KR: 살치살, Chuck Flap Tail. PRIME 등급만 취급. Choice 등급은 구이용 불가, 수령 거부. 얇은 갈비살 컷, 두께 0.5센티미터.
scripts.EN: Chuck Flap Tail, Salchi-sal. Prime grade only. Choice grade is unfit for grilling — reject. Galbisal cut, 0.5 centimeter thick.
scripts.ES: Chuck Flap Tail, Salchi-sal. Solo Prime grade. Choice grade no es apto para asar — rechace. Corte galbisal, 0.5 centimetros.

scripts.KR: 부채살, Flat Iron 또는 Top Blade. Shoulder Clod에서 분리되어야 합니다. 심줄 경계 확인 필수. 스테이크 1.5센티미터.
scripts.EN: Flat Iron, Top Blade. Must be separated from Shoulder Clod. Verify clean seam. Steak cut 1.5 centimeter.
scripts.ES: Flat Iron, Top Blade. Debe estar separado del Shoulder Clod. Verifique costura limpia. Bistec 1.5 centimetro.

scripts.KR: 늙간살, Rib Fingers 또는 Intercostal. Peeled 필수. 막과 뼈쪽 조직 완전 제거 확인. 얇고 긴 형태 유지.
scripts.EN: Rib Fingers, Intercostal. Must be Peeled. Membrane and bone-side tissue fully removed. Keep thin and long shape.
scripts.ES: Rib Fingers, Intercostal. Debe estar Peeled. Membrana y tejido del hueso completamente removidos. Mantenga forma delgada y larga.

scripts.KR: 업진살, Short Plate 또는 Beef Belly. Boneless와 Trimmed 두 스펙 모두 확인. 긴 직사각 형태 유지.
scripts.EN: Short Plate, Beef Belly. Verify both Boneless and Trimmed specs. Keep long rectangular shape.
scripts.ES: Short Plate, Beef Belly. Verifique ambas especificaciones: Boneless y Trimmed. Mantenga forma rectangular larga.

scripts.KR: 새우살, Ribeye Cap 또는 Spinalis. Deckle-off Spinalis만 취급. 최고 마진 품목. 원형 말기 또는 스테이크 컷.
scripts.EN: Ribeye Cap, Spinalis. Deckle-off Spinalis only. Highest margin item. Cinnamon roll shape or steak cut.
scripts.ES: Ribeye Cap, Spinalis. Solo Deckle-off Spinalis. Maximo margen. Forma de rollo o corte bistec.

scripts.KR: 알등심, Ribeye Roll, Export Style. Lip-off 필수. Lip-on은 과다 지방, 손실 크니 수령 거부. 스테이크 2센티미터.
scripts.EN: Ribeye Roll, Export Style. Lip-off required. Lip-on means excess fat — reject. Steak 2 centimeter.
scripts.ES: Ribeye Roll, Export Style. Lip-off obligatorio. Lip-on significa grasa excesiva — rechace. Bistec 2 centimetros.

scripts.KR: 홍두깨살, Eye of Round. Denuded 스펙 필수. 외부 지방 모두 제거 확인. 원형 말기 또는 얇은 슬라이스.
scripts.EN: Eye of Round. Denuded spec required. All external fat removed. Round roll or thin slices.
scripts.ES: Eye of Round. Denuded obligatorio. Grasa externa removida. Rollo redondo o rebanadas finas.

scripts.KR: 꽃등심덧살, Lifter Meat 또는 Blade Meat. 주의: Ribeye Cap과 혼동 금지. 완전히 다른 부위, 가격도 다릅니다.
scripts.EN: Lifter Meat, Blade Meat. Warning: do not confuse with Ribeye Cap. Completely different cut and price.
scripts.ES: Lifter Meat, Blade Meat. Atencion: no confundir con Ribeye Cap. Corte y precio diferentes.
